name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
overview: SRM Institute of Science and Technology is a deemed-to-be university with campuses in Kattankulathur, Ramapuram, Vadapalani, Trichy, NCR Delhi, and Acharapakkam.
vision: To emerge as a world-class university in creating and disseminating knowledge and providing students a unique learning experience in Science, Technology, Medicine, Management and other areas of scholarship.
mission: Move up through international alliances and collaborative initiatives, accomplish a process to advance knowledge, and attract and build people in an inspiring environment.
rankingNote: See the official NIRF, IQAC, and public disclosure pages for current accreditation and ranking details.
